headline: Assessing Copart (CPRT) Valuation After Jim Cramer And ClearBridge Renew Optimism
summary: Why Copart is Suddenly in the Spotlight Recent endorsements of Copart (CPRT) from Jim Cramer, who called the stock too cheap, and ClearBridge Investments, which reaffirmed its confidence despite temporary volume headwinds, have pushed the vehicle auction specialist into sharper investor focus. See our latest analysis for Copart. Those endorsements have arrived after a mixed stretch for Copart, with the latest share price at $33.68, a 90 day share price return of -18.39% and a 1 year total...
